final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    reg obf_master;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        obf_master <= D;  // Sample data on the rising edge of CLK
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Q <= obf_master;  // Update output on the falling edge of CLK
    end
endmodule
